title: Remote and Hybrid Work Policy: Eligibility and Expectations
text:
Q: What are the eligibility criteria and expectations for remote and hybrid work at our company?
A: Employees are eligible for remote or hybrid work if they have completed at least six months of continuous employment and have demonstrated strong performance in their current role. To request a remote or hybrid work arrangement, employees must submit a formal request to their direct supervisor at least four weeks in advance. Expectations for remote work include maintaining regular communication with team members, attending all scheduled meetings, and meeting project deadlines. Employees are also required to be available during core business hours, which are from 9 AM to 5 PM. For hybrid arrangements, employees should agree on a schedule with their supervisor that outlines in-office and remote days. All arrangements must comply with the company's data security and confidentiality policies. For further questions or assistance, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
